name: Fanuc CNC 半精铣工位
description: FANUC Series 0i-MF数控系统，半精铣工位：主轴约4000RPM，进给约500mm/min，切深中等，表面粗糙度Ra3.2~6.3

points.name: spindle_speed
points.description: 主轴实际转速，半精铣工位：空闲为0，启动后稳定在约4000RPM

points.name: feed_rate
points.description: 半精铣实际进给速度：切入阶段低速，稳定半精铣约500mm/min，退刀阶段降速

points.name: spindle_current
points.description: 半精铣主轴电流：空闲约2A，启动约5A，切入峰值约17A，稳定半精铣约13~16A

points.name: vibration_x
points.description: X轴振动加速度，半精铣切深中等，振动幅值中等

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 150
if 28 <= t < 128:
    base = 0.35 + 0.2 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 55 + 0.8)
else:
    base = 0.08
noise = random.uniform(-0.08, 0.08)
result = round(max(0.05, base + noise), 3)

points.name: vibration_y
points.description: Y轴振动加速度，半精铣切深中等，振动幅值中等

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 150
if 28 <= t < 128:
    base = 0.35 + 0.2 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 45 + 1.8)
else:
    base = 0.08
noise = random.uniform(-0.08, 0.08)
result = round(max(0.05, base + noise), 3)

points.name: vibration_z
points.description: Z轴振动加速度，半精铣切深中等，振动幅值中等

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 150
if 28 <= t < 128:
    base = 0.4 + 0.22 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 38 + 2.8)
else:
    base = 0.1
noise = random.uniform(-0.1, 0.1)
result = round(max(0.05, base + noise), 3)

points.name: spindle_load
points.description: 半精铣主轴负载率，稳定阶段约30~45%，切入瞬间约48%，短时允许到120%

points.name: exec_status
points.description: 执行状态(0=空闲 1=运行 2=暂停 3=M00停 4=M01停)

points.name: tool_no
points.description: 当前刀具号，半精铣工位固定使用T2

points.name: cycle_time
points.description: 循环时间，半精铣单件约150s
